{{Quote|Morteos was responsible for the death of Republic General Crix Masst on Sinded. Masst was killed by a bomb that was wired into his personal speeder's repulsorlift generator. Morteos was nearly shot down by Y-wing patrol vessels while trying to escape Sinded, but his modified freighter was quick enough to outpace the aging starfighters.|Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WBC" />}}
[[General/Legends|General]] '''Crix Masst''' was a former member of [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]]<ref name="WW" /> and a brilliant tactician who believed strongly in the ideals of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was killed on [[Sinded]] by the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Morteos]], who wired a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] into the [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generator of the general's personal [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]].<ref name="WBC" />

Masst kept a journal, which he wrote using the same [[Atrisian script]] that Special Operations personnel frequently used when creating and transmitting tightly-coded, spurious mission plans for the purpose of tying up the resources of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], a practice known as "[[salting the ether]]."<ref name="WW" />
